title: Simple Hoof Boot - Black (sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo Simple Hoof Boot! SOLD AS PAIRS (Available in Regular and Slim Sole, Sizes 0–6) The Original Cavallo Hoof Boot , the Cavallo Simple Boot, has stood the test of time. Crafted from durable genuine leather, the Cavallo Simple Hoof Boot delivers comfort, flexibility, and long-lasting performance. The leather upper moulds to your horse’s hoof for a custom, secure fit, making it a reliable choice for riders who demand function and comfort. Trusted worldwide for daily riding, trail adventures, and therapy, the Simple Boot is a proven favourite for horses recovering from injury or navigating rugged terrain. The Cavallo Simple Boot is available in both Regular and Slim Sole widths. Please determine your horse’s sole shape before ordering by following our sizing guide or submitting photos of your measurements. The Cavallo Simple Hoof Boot is an excellent choice for both riding and rehabilitation. The Simple supports recovery from laminitis, navicular, abscesses, sole bruising, hoof cracks, punctures, contracted heels, and more. It’s also ideal for horses with chronic hoof pain or sensitivity, and provides extra protection during trailering, turnout, and stall rest. Use the Simple Boot barefoot or over metal shoes; perfect for everyday trail rides, turnout, arena work, or as a reliable backup in case of lost shoes. The design is easy to use, fast to secure, and simple to clean, ma

title: Trek BLACK Hoof Boot (sold per single Boot)
text: Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot - Black SOLD AS SINGLE BOOTS (Available in Regular and Slim Sole, sizes 0-6) The Cavallo Trek Hoof Boot is the most flexible, durable, breathable, and user-friendly Hoof Boot . Trusted by riders for everyday riding and built for performance, the Trek boot stands up to rocky trails, muddy paths, and therapeutic or rehabilitation uses. The honeycomb-patterned upper delivers maximum strength with minimal weight, offering your horse comfort without compromise. Riders love the Cavallo Trek for Jumping, Dressage, and other high-impact sports. Exclusive to Cavallo, the TREK Hoof Boots feature a moulded Pro Mesh upper - a high-performance thermoplastic urethane (TPU) material that’s both lightweight and incredibly strong. The unique honeycomb design enhances flexibility, allowing the upper to move and mould with the hoof, and offers a secure, custom fit for every horse. This breathable, abrasion-resistant pro mesh allows heat and moisture to escape, helping to keep hooves cool, clean, and dry. Built to withstand rugged terrain, water crossings, and repeated use, Pro Mesh resists UV damage and does not trap bacteria. It maintains its shape over time while delivering the adaptable support your horse needs on every ride. Cavallo’s Trek Hoof Boot is available in both Regular and Slim sole options. title: Sport Hoof Boot (sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo Sport Hoof Boot SOLD AS PAIRS (Available in Regular and Slim Sole, Sizes 0–6) The Cavallo Sport Hoof Boot features a sleek, stylish design and is ideal for everyday riding, training, and hoof protection. Designed with a refined shape and low profile, the Cavallo Sport offers a tailored fit for your horse. The 1680 Denier nylon upper is exceptionally tough and durable, while remaining lightweight for all-day comfort. The unique post-peg side closure, featuring industrial-strength elastic, provides adjustability and a snug, secure fit. Reflective piping enhances visibility in low-light or nighttime conditions, making the Sport a practical option for both riders and handlers seeking safety, simplicity, and quality. The Cavallo Sport Boot is available in both Regular and Slim Sole widths. Please determine your horse’s sole shape before ordering by following our Sizing Guide or submitting photos of your measurements. Trusted by riders around the world, the Cavallo Sport Boot also supports horses recovering from laminitis, navicular, abscesses, sole bruising, hoof cracks, punctures , and more. Whether used for riding, turnout, trailering, or rehab, the Cavallo Sport provides a stylish fit, offering your horse comfort, protection, and performance. title: ELB - Entry Level Hoof Boot (sold per single boot)
text: Cavallo ELB (Entry Level Boot) - Black SOLD AS SINGLE BOOTS (Available in Regular and Slim Sole, sizes 0-6) The Cavallo ELB (Entry Level Boot) is your go-to hoof boot for everyday riding, comfort, and convenience, all at an accessible price. Whether you’re new to hoof boots or an old pro, the ELB Bling offers Cavallo’s trusted quality in a streamlined, budget-friendly design that will bedazzle the crowds! Made from tough 1680 Denier industrial-grade nylon, the Cavallo ELB Hoof Boot can be used barefoot or over metal horseshoes, perfect for arena riding, light trails, transport, stall rest, and as a “spare tire” for lost shoes. The replaceable Velcro closure ensures a secure fit, while the padded leather inside the heel bulb provides extra comfort and protection. Like all Cavallo boots, the ELB is designed for easy use: Easy On. Stays On. Easy Off. The Cavallo ELB Hoof Boot is available in both Regular and Slim sole options. Please ensure that you determine whether your horse requires Slim or Regular sole before ordering by sending in your measuring photos or by following our sizing guide . The versatile, front closure design of the ELB ensures that it fits a wide variety of horses, from light to heavy-boned breeds. title: Bling CLB “Cute Little Boots” – For Minis (sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo CLB (Cute Little Boot) - Bling SOLD AS PAIRS (Available in Regular and Slim Sole, sizes M1-M4) The Cavallo CLB (Cute Little Boot) in Bling is your go-to hoof boot for miniature horses and other small-hoofed ponies. Designed to provide support for everyday wear, therapeutic use, trail adventures, and hoof rehabilitation, the CLB is the perfect choice for your tiny-hooved companions. Whether you're new to hoof boots or a seasoned user, the CLB delivers Cavallo’s trusted quality in smaller sizes with Bling that is sure to bedazzle the crowds! The Cavallo CLB Hoof Boot is available in both Regular and Slim sole options. Please ensure that you determine whether your pony requires Slim or Regular sole before ordering by sending in your measuring photos or by following our sizing guide . The versatile, front closure design of the CLB ensures that it fits a wide variety of horses, from petite to stocky builds. Cavallo CLB uppers are made of the highest quality materials possible and have passed Cavallo’s strict wear tests. CLB “Cute Little Boots” can be used for hoof rehabilitation following founder and laminitis, while also being ideal for driving, arena and trail work. Additionally, the CLB offers improved grip on smooth floors, making it perfect for therapy and service minis working in hospitals and homes. title: How Do Cavallo Hoof Boots Compare
h1: How Do Cavallo Hoof Boots Compare To Other Brands?
text: How Do Cavallo Hoof Boots Compare To Other Brands? Cavallo Hoof Boots Compare the best in comfort, durability, and ease of use. When it comes to choosing hoof boots, Cavallo stands out with superior protection, ergonomic design, and user-friendly features. Whether you need a boot for trail riding, therapeutic support, or everyday wear, Cavallo Hoof Boots offer unmatched performance. With durable materials, customizable fit, and a range of accessories, Cavallo boots ensure long-lasting comfort and protection for your horse across all terrains. Explore how Cavallo Hoof Boots compare to other brands and see why they’re the top choice for riders worldwide.
